slides.title: Scene 1
slides.subtitle: The Ancient Castle at Dawn
slides.body: A majestic fortress rises above the morning mist, its stone towers reaching toward the golden sky as a new quest begins.

slides.title: Scene 2
slides.subtitle: The Knight's Departure
slides.body: Clad in gleaming armor, the brave knight stands ready at the castle gates, determined to face whatever dangers lie ahead on his journey.

slides.title: Scene 3
slides.subtitle: The Enchanted Forest Path
slides.body: The knight ventures deep into an ancient woodland where sunlight filters through towering trees and magic whispers through the leaves.

slides.title: Scene 4
slides.subtitle: The Magical Sword in Stone
slides.body: A legendary blade radiates ethereal light from its stone prison, waiting for a worthy hero to claim its power and fulfill an ancient prophecy.

slides.title: Scene 5
slides.subtitle: The Dark Cave Entrance
slides.body: Ancient runes mark the entrance to a foreboding cavern where darkness dwells and only the bravest dare to enter and face unknown terrors.

slides.title: Scene 6
slides.subtitle: The Dragon's Treasure Hoard
slides.body: Mountains of glittering gold and precious jewels fill the dragon's lair, the reward for courage and the prize for defeating the fearsome beast.

slides.title: Scene 7
slides.subtitle: The Knight Victorious
slides.body: Battle-worn but triumphant, the knight raises his sword to the heavens, having conquered the darkness and proven his valor and strength.

slides.title: Scene 8
slides.subtitle: The Royal Crown
slides.body: An ornate golden crown adorned with precious gems rests upon velvet, symbol of honor and the kingdom's gratitude for the hero's bravery.

slides.title: Scene 9
slides.subtitle: The Village Celebration
slides.body: The village erupts in joyous celebration with colorful banners and flowers adorning the square as people gather to honor their returning hero.

slides.title: Scene 10
slides.subtitle: The Sunset Over the Kingdom
slides.body: Peace returns to the realm as the sun sets over rolling hills and the castle, painting the sky in brilliant colors of hope.

slides.title: Scene 1
slides.subtitle: The Peaceful Kingdom
slides.body: A tranquil medieval kingdom rests in green valleys, villages thriving, farmers working fields, warm sunlight glowing across peaceful homes and streams.

slides.title: Scene 2
slides.subtitle: The Mountain Rumbles
slides.body: A towering snow-capped mountain trembles violently, dark smoke rising from its peak, rocks tumbling down slopes, storm clouds gathering above.

slides.title: Scene 3
slides.subtitle: The Dragon Emerges
slides.body: From the cavernous mountain mouth bursts a massive red dragon, wings spread wide, golden eyes blazing, fire glowing deep within.

slides.title: Scene 4
slides.subtitle: The Burning Village
slides.body: Flames devour wooden homes as smoke fills the sky, villagers flee frightened, marketplace abandoned, ash drifting slowly across streets.

slides.title: Scene 5
slides.subtitle: The Royal Council Chamber
slides.body: Inside the grand stone throne room, worried nobles gather around maps and scrolls, torches flicker while urgent plans form.

slides.title: Scene 6
slides.subtitle: The Young Knight Volunteers
slides.body: A young knight in shining armor steps forward bravely, hand gripping his sword, vowing to face the dragon alone.

slides.title: Scene 7
slides.subtitle: The Enchanted Shield
slides.body: A magical shield covered in glowing runes floats in mystical light, ancient power radiating, chosen as the knight’s protection.

slides.title: Scene 8
slides.subtitle: The Epic Battle
slides.body: On a rocky battlefield the knight confronts the dragon, fiery breath roaring, shield raised high, sparks and flames everywhere.

slides.title: Scene 9
slides.subtitle: The Dragon Slain
slides.body: After the battle the dragon rests peacefully within its crystal cave, wounds healed, gentle glow surrounding the quiet mountain.

slides.title: Scene 10
slides.subtitle: The Kingdom Restored
slides.body: The kingdom celebrates under golden sunlight, villages rebuilt, people joyful again, flowers blooming across fields, peace finally restored.
